Amended Motion To Quash Notice Of Deposition Of Denmark Manansala And/Or Motion For Protective Order And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mathew Stephenson, Esq. of KOCHAN & STEPHENSON (415 / 392-6200), appearing for plaintiff
Jennifer M. Chan, Esq. of SIMPSON GARRITY & INNES (650 / 615-4860), appearing for defendant

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted, subject to Court's clarification. PLAINTIFF Maria Cortez'S Motion to Quash Notice of Deposition of Denmark Manansala and/or For Protective Order; and For Monetary Sanctions: a. Motion to Quash or For Protective Order DENIED. Based on the court's understanding that the subject deposition of the witness Manansala already has been taken by defendant, the motion is moot. b. Plaintiff's request for sanctions denied. Plaintiff is to submit proposed order, subject to opposing counsel's prior review. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Ntc Of Deposition Of Denmark Manansala And/Or Mtn For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Prohibiting Second Deposition Of Denmark Manansala;
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jennifer M. Chan, Esq. of SIMPSON GARRITY & INNES (650/ 615-4860), appearing for defendant
Mathew Stephenson, Esq. of KOCHAN & STEPHENSON (415/ 392-6200), appearing for plaintiff

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted, subject to Court's clarification. DEFENDANT Telamon Engineering Consultants, Inc.'s Motion For Protective Order Prohibiting Second Deposition of Denmark Manansala; and For Monetary Sanctions. a. Defendant's motion for protective order DENIED. Plaintiff may notice and take the deposition of the witness Manansala at a time and place convenient to all parties and the witness. b. Defendant's request for sanctions denied. Plaintiff is to submit proposed order, subject to opposing counsel's prior review. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
